questionHtml:
The coefficient of dynamic friction between the block and the rough surface is 0.400. 

Estimate the distance travelled by the block on the rough surface until it stops.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1
Frictional force is f«= 0.400 × 2.40 × 9.81» = 9.42 «N» ✓
9.42 × d = 12 × 2.40 × 2.162  OR  d = 5.59879.42✓
d = 0.594 «m» ✓

 

ALTERNATIVE 2
a = «fm = µg = 0.4 × 9.81 =» 3.924 «m s−2» ✓

Proper use of kinematics equation(s) to determine ✓

d = 0.594 «m» ✓

meta.title: The coefficient of dynamic friction between the block and the rough surface is 0.400. Estimate the distance travelled by the block on the rough surface until it stops.
